text: In the first scene, I feel quietly contemplative, surrounded by people each absorbed in their own worlds, perhaps awaiting something—the air tinged with anticipation and a touch of formality. In the second, amid glowing screens and text celebrating technological progress, I am struck by the irony: we stand among wonders yet return to silent reflection, arms folded, pondering purpose and progress. Together, these moments evoke a sense of being a small observer within the vast, ongoing story of human curiosity and communal search for understanding.
